description: In OpenELIS Global, navigate to 'Results' from the sidebar menu and then select 'By Unit'. On the results entry page, select the 'Biochemistry' unit from the dropdown and click the search/filter button to display pending tests. For any displayed patient sample with a pending Glucose test, enter the result value '126' mg/dL (from real MIMIC-III clinical data, LOINC 2345-7), and for any pending Creatinine test, enter the result value '7.0' mg/dL (MIMIC-III patient 10006, LOINC 2160-0). After entering results, click the 'Save' button to submit them. The OpenELIS login credentials are: username 'admin', password 'adminADMIN!'.

metadata.data_source: MIMIC-III Clinical Database Demo v1.4 (PhysioNet, patient 10006)
